terms.title: cGAN
terms.summary: cGAN belongs to the Generative Models area of AI/ML, within Adversarial Networks. It sits inside Generative Models / Adversarial Networks. Compare it with Conditional GAN (cGAN) and Conditional GAN (cGAN) Variants. It opens into Conditional GAN (cGAN) and Conditional GAN (cGAN) Variants.
